items.title: Global Biobased Propylene Glycol Market Poised for Steady Growth, Projected to Reach USD 7,956.5 Million by 2035 | Future Market Insights, Inc.
items.author: Future Market Insights, Inc.
items.description: The global biobased propylene glycol market is expected to grow from $4.5 billion in 2023 to $8 billion by 2035, driven by rising demand for sustainable personal care products and government regulations supporting eco-friendly alternatives.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Dow has launched new sustainable varieties of propylene glycol, showcasing the company's commitment to providing eco-friendly solutions and aligning with the industry's shift towards renewable chemicals.
BASF is a prominent player in the biobased propylene glycol market, demonstrating the company's focus on developing and supplying sustainable chemical products.
ADM is involved in the biobased propylene glycol market, indicating the company's participation in the production and distribution of renewable chemical alternatives.
LyondellBasell is a key player in the biobased propylene glycol market, showcasing the company's efforts to expand its portfolio of sustainable chemical solutions.
Huntsman's involvement in the biobased propylene glycol market suggests the company's commitment to developing and offering eco-friendly chemical products.
Repsol's participation in the biobased propylene glycol market indicates the company's focus on diversifying its portfolio to include renewable chemical solutions.
P&G Chemicals' involvement in the biobased propylene glycol market suggests the company's commitment to incorporating renewable and eco-friendly ingredients in its products.
